title: Reserve label space for larger node icons
description: Icon-bearing 2D nodes now reserve horizontal space and place labels in the text area to the right of the icon.
decision_notes: Nodes with provider or kind metadata reserve extra width during layout because those nodes can receive provider/kind icons at render time.
Single-icon SVG node labels are centered within the remaining text area to the right of the icon instead of the full node body.
Abstraction icon grids keep their existing centered layout; this change targets normal component icons that were overlapping labels after icon scaling.
